purpose: Fit a compact voice-specific spectral scaler from the frozen unseen-context natural anchors, then determine which prior unseen automatic vowel candidates can be checked fail-closed on arbitrary typed contexts without rerendering or reclassifying the frozen confirmation.

scope.candidate_audio: Reuse every frozen neutral/lens WAV from the unseen confirmation. No candidate may be rerendered, replaced, or selected again.
scope.eligibility: Only an existing unseen automatic pass may remain runtime eligible. This gate cannot add a new cell or rescue a prior failure.

rendering.renderer: Kokoro 0.9.4 local pinned model and exact selected voice

measurement.scaler: Fit one immutable median/MAD robust scaler per voice from all three-seed natural source and target features in all 84 frozen unseen slots. This differs from the prior leave-current-slot-out analysis and is a new runtime instrument; prior classifications remain immutable.
measurement.context_endpoints: For each occurrence, source and target centroids use all three current-context natural-anchor seeds under that occurrence's voice scaler.
measurement.anchor_sanity: For each of the three seeds, classify the held-out natural source/target pair against centroids from the other two seeds. At least two pairs must be exact and none may reverse direction.
measurement.candidate: Classify the frozen lens relative to the frozen neutral against the current-context three-seed endpoints.
measurement.identity_control: Classify the frozen neutral against itself. Any directional identity result fails instrument sanity globally.

decision_rule.cell_runtime_gate_pass: The cell was already an unseen automatic pass; every frozen occurrence passes anchor sanity and remains exact-category or directional-only under the runtime scaler; every identity control remains negative.
decision_rule.cell_runtime_gate_fail: Any prior pass that misses the new runtime gate is removed from runtime eligibility without changing its frozen unseen-confirmation classification.
decision_rule.global_instrument_fail: Any identity false positive makes every cell runtime-ineligible and closes this runtime instrument.
decision_rule.human_qc: No automatic outcome establishes naturalness, sentence-like delivery, perceived direction, or listener-profile fit.

claim_limits.pass: A pass makes a prior unseen automatic candidate eligible for a fail-closed per-request acoustic implementation. It is not product support until that implementation and blind human QC pass.
claim_limits.failure: A failure removes that voice/rule cell from the runtime candidate set. It does not rewrite the frozen unseen result.
claim_limits.coverage: This protocol covers oral vowels only. It does not validate nasal vowels, consonants, insertions, prosody, multi-rule composition, arbitrary words, or either full language direction.
